description: Single depicted Ajani anchor in corpus (Ajani Fells the Godsire, MH3 #19 — saga-mode monument rendering, figure not in art). Two M21 cards (Heroic Intervention, Radiant Fountain) carry Ajani Goldmane as flavor-text speaker, but the Slobad / Sheoldred precedent on _characters/phyrexia.md classifies flavor speakers as context only, not anchor-eligible. Worst node-proposal threshold violation. Refused. The team-rocket precedent is 1 enriched depiction + 1 prep-stub of a distinct beat. We have one. Deferred to triage.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Ajani Goldmane — canonical character with multi-set arc culminating in Phyrexia: All Will Be One compleation]
